history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 07 column D, facing upward. The cell directly ahead at row 06 column D is safe and open, while the goal is farther ahead to the right. Moving forward advances me toward the goal without stepping into lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me is a lava cell, so moving forward would be deadly. I need to avoid it and instead turn to find a safe route toward the goal visible ahead and to the right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward, and the cell directly ahead is unknown, while both left and right are open floor cells. To make progress safely and explore toward the goal, I will move forward into the unknown cell.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward. The cell directly ahead is a safe floor cell, while the cells to the left and right are also constrained by nearby walls. Since I need to make progress through the open corridor, moving forward is the safest useful step.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward. The cell directly ahead is unknown, but the cells to my left and right on the current row are safe floor, while the row above is still unexplored. Since I need to explore toward the goal and forward is at least not blocked by a wall or lava in view, I will move ahead into the unknown cell.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward, and the cell directly ahead is a safe floor cell. Moving forward advances me through the open corridor toward the unknown area, while turning would waste progress.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing upward, and the cell directly ahead is open floor. Turning would not help me progress toward unexplored space, so the safest and most direct move is to go forward into the free cell.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing up. The cell directly ahead is safe and open, while the left and right are also open but not needed yet. Since the goal is not visible, the best immediate move is to advance into unexplored space.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 07 column D. The cell directly ahead of me is open floor, so the safest progress is to move forward rather than turning. This advances me toward the open area and potentially toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 07, column D facing up. The cell directly ahead is safe floor, while the goal is not yet visible. Moving forward advances me into unexplored space and keeps me away from the walls.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is an open floor, so moving forward is safe and lets me explore toward the unknown area above.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D, facing up. The cell directly in front of me is row 06 column D, which is a wall, so I cannot move forward. I need to turn to find a free direction. The left side at row 07 column C is open, so turning left is the safest next step.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward. The cell directly ahead is row 06 column D, which is a safe floor cell, while the cells to my left are lava. Moving forward is the safest progress.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 07 column D, facing up. The cell directly ahead is row 06 column D, which is a wall, so I cannot move forward. My left and right are both open in the current row, and I need to choose a safe direction to continue exploring. Turning right will face me toward the open cell at row 07 column E, which is free.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D, facing upward. The cell directly ahead is a safe floor cell, and moving forward takes me into the open corridor toward the right-side area. I should advance.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
